description: Task demonstrates a struct that uses enum fields. This shows how enum types can be used within other structures.

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for the task.

name.description: Name is the title of the task.

description.description: Description provides details about the task.

status.description: Status indicates the current state of the task. This will use the Status enum type defined above.

priority.description: Priority indicates how important this task is.

tags.description: Tags are additional categorization for the task.
